title: Wire EV-breakeven threshold (B0155) into multi_h4 headline/grid - root cause of systemic NO_FIRE
source: B0148 post-mortem OOF diagnostic 2026-06-11 (calibrated-p distributions, pooled + baseline trees)
why: Measured root cause of the systemic NO_FIRE: multi_h4 uses tp=3.0/sl=1.0 ATR barriers (base win rate ~23%; OOF calibrated-p median 0.23 = correctly calibrated) but the threshold grid spans 0.50-0.62. EV breakeven for that geometry (B0155 formula, C_ATR=0.10, lambda=0.05) is p*~0.325; OOF q99 reaches 0.43-0.51, so hundreds of EV-positive events in [0.33, 0.50] are unreachable BY CONSTRUCTION. Neither pooling (B0148 falsified) nor more data can move this. Calibration is NOT broken - do not touch sigmoid. Threshold rule must be derived a-priori from geometry+costs (as ev_breakeven_v1 already is in phase5), never tuned on results.
value_rationale: Unblocks measurement on every multi_h4 cell AND is the hard gate for B0160 (transfer follow-up); does not create edge - lets DSR measure whether any exists.
scope: Wire ev_breakeven_v1 (phase5) as the multi_h4 headline threshold: p* from tp/sl/costs per config; report fixed 0.55 as legacy diagnostic only
Re-center threshold_grid around p* (e.g. p* + {0, .03, .06, .10, .15}) instead of the fixed 0.50-0.62
Pre-register: ONE re-run of the per-asset arm with the new rule; DSR>0.95 bar unchanged; if AUC ~0.5 and Sharpe negative-after-costs, record 'no discrimination' as the honest null
Add OOF AUC / Brier-vs-base-rate per (asset,primary,model) to summary.json so discrimination is visible without parquet spelunking
Secondary (separate, optional): wire B0120 continuous bet sizing from p as an alternative to any binary threshold (guard-rails per pipeline/sizing.py docstrings)
recommendation: Do BEFORE any new Loop-A batch on multi_h4 cells and before B0160; the phase5 path already uses ev_breakeven and does not need this.

history.reason: Implemented + measured 2026-06-11: ev_breakeven wired (1557 tests green, code-reviewed), pre-registered re-run 16/16 pairs. NO SURVIVOR (max DSR 0.655 SOL/momz). Honest null confirmed: AUC 0.45-0.52 on FX/XAG/SOL (no discrimination); mild pockets XAU/ema 0.55 and BTC-ETH/momz 0.53-0.54, too weak for costs+significance. Measurement layer fixed: 12/16 pairs now trade vs 3/16; oof_discrimination in summary.json. Verdict: results/b0161/verdict.md
